content_body: Five of my friends and I really enjoyed staying at Live Streaming Lodge. The cabin was beautifully furnished and the chef's kitchen came fully furnished with all the items I needed to cook an exquisite meal. The four bedrooms were extremely spacious and I really enjoyed the jacuzzi in the main floor en suite bathroom. The movie theatre down stairs as well as the TV in the living room were excellent for watching movies. Lastly, we totally enjoyed hanging out on the screened in porch and enjoying the beautiful view.
title: Beautifully Furnished With Everything We Needed!
